title: Confederation of Frosthaven
content:
The Congress of Mossenden (1976) was a diplomatic agreement in which Ulric Rourke, foreign minister of Confederation of Frosthaven, helped finalize terms at Elmswick.

Background.

By the early 1976s, diplomats from Confederation of Frosthaven sought a settlement after years of border incidents near Elmswick.

Negotiations.

Ulric Rourke, serving as foreign minister, chaired preliminary talks that began in spring 1975. Neutral observers from neighboring cantons attended the sessions.
